arts.ttl: £37m asking price: Arsenal, Man Utd & Chelsea on alert as transfer plan in place
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly among the clubs on alert for the potential transfer of Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. It looks increasingly like a decision has already been made for Vlahovic to leave Juve this summer, and the Premier League could be his next destination. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim slammed for Man Utd decision in Nottingham Forest loss - 'I don't get it'
arts.sum: Manchester United were beaten 1-0 by Nottingham Forest on Tuesday and Ruben Amorim's decision to start Joshua Zirkzee over Rasmus Hojlund has been branded "crazy"

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand calls out three Man United stars at fault for Nottingham Forest defeat
arts.sum: Manchester United suffered a 1-0 defeat away to Nottingham Forest on Saturday afternoon, with Anthony Elanga scoring the only goal of the game after just five minutes

arts.ttl: Ryan Yates says Nottingham Forest star was unbelievable vs Manchester United, he's a 'dream' to play with
Exclusive: Man United battling Liverpool for transfer of 19-year-old rising star
arts.sum: Manchester United look to be showing an increasing interest in the potential transfer of highly-rated young Como winger Assane Diao. Sources with a close understanding of the player’s situation have informed CaughtOffside that he’s attracting interest from Man Utd, Liverpool and Newcastle ahead of the summer. Diao has a contract until 2029 with Como, so […] The post Exclusive: Man United battling Liverpool for transfer of 19-year-old rising star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Amorim admits he is under pressure and laments United’s lack of forward quality
arts.athr: Ben Fisher at the City Ground
arts.sum: ‘I will not have the time. We have to get it right, fast’ Manager put Harry Maguire up front as late substitute Ruben Amorim bemoaned Manchester United’s toothless attack as Nottingham Forest completed a Premier League double over his side and reiterated he is under pressure to ensure his team “get it right fast”. Forest enhanced their chances of qualifying for the Champions League with a third successive league win, courtesy of an extraordinary counterattack goal by the former United forward Anthony Elanga, while United are 13th and yet to record back-to-back wins in the division this season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Talks held: Man United discussing £40m transfer move, could have advantage over Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly held more internal discussions recently over a potential transfer move for Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap. The England Under-21 international has impressed a great deal for Ipswich this season, scoring ten Premier League goals despite his team’s struggles overall.
